accept.reason: the no-eval lint-ignore on line 48 is a deliberate, reviewed test that eval()s a matches() regex built from a URL — a controlled test input, not a quick-path suppression of a real warning

these are verbatim cached third-party event pages (recorded via ScraperAPI / user-submitted), used as offline extraction fixtures — the lint-suppression pragmas flagged here live inside the captured sites' own bundled JavaScript, not our code. Editing the fixtures to strip them would corrupt the recorded HTML the live/fallback tests assert against; they are not our suppressions to resolve

sharedConstants.what: release zip filename — must match between the build script and the thin workflow stubs that pass it to the Claudinite canon workflows (zip_path in release/daily, zip_name in publish/daily)
extension version — one X.Y.Z token per manifest, kept identical across both files (bumped by the daily-release patcher and the human "bump version" flow); regex so it needs no re-pinning on a bump
